assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.
Developer has a compatible local development environment (e.g., macOS with Homebrew or equivalent shell environment).
Developer has basic knowledge of TypeScript or Go programming languages.

developer_goal: Start building a backend application with Encore by installing the CLI and creating a new app.

first_success.outcome: Developer runs the app locally and successfully calls the API endpoint, receiving the expected JSON response
first_success.observable_signal: Receiving the JSON response {"Message": "Hello, world!"} from the API endpoint call

prerequisites.description: Install the Encore CLI appropriate for your system (e.g., via Homebrew on macOS)
Create a free Encore Cloud account when prompted during app creation to enable cloud deployment and secret management
Basic familiarity with TypeScript programming language (or Go, but quick start uses TypeScript)

external_gates.description: Creating a free Encore Cloud account is required to manage secrets and enable cloud deployments
Installing the Encore CLI is required to develop and run Encore apps locally

platform_outcomes.description: Successfully run a local Encore app and receive a valid API response from the local development environment
